name: DCAT-AP-NL 3.0 profile
description:
# DCAT-AP-NL 3.0

This building block provides a framework to test compatibility of DCAT-AP-NL with DCAT-AP, and serves as a building block to express the DCAT-AP-NL to OGC API Records relation downstream.

examples.title: DCAT-AP-NL 3.0 example
examples.content: This is an example conforming to DCAT-AP-NL 3.0
